CustomField.formula:
ISPICKVAL( Owner.GeographyLevel__c , "ALL") ||
AND((ISPICKVAL( Owner.GeographyLevel__c , "Country")), ( TEXT( Owner.GeographyValue__c ) = Account.PKICountry__r.Name )) ||
AND((ISPICKVAL( Owner.GeographyLevel__c , "Super Territory")), ( TEXT( Owner.GeographyValue__c ) = TEXT( Account.PKICountry__r.Super_Territory__c ))) ||
AND((ISPICKVAL( Owner.GeographyLevel__c , "Global territory")), ( TEXT( Owner.GeographyValue__c ) = TEXT( Account.PKICountry__r.Global_Territory__c )))
||
AND((ISPICKVAL( Owner.GeographyLevel__c , "Territory")), ( TEXT( Owner.GeographyValue__c ) = TEXT( Account.PKICountry__r.Territory__c ))) ||
AND((ISPICKVAL( Owner.GeographyLevel__c , "Sub Territory")), ( TEXT( Owner.GeographyValue__c ) = TEXT( Account.PKICountry__r.Sub_Territory__c )))
CustomField.label: fxInOwnerGeography
